functions.onLatexChange(cb): Registers cb(currentValue:string); returns an unsubscribe function; fires on every user 'input' event.
functions.getInputElement(): Returns the textarea element (or null if not yet attached).

subscription_form_chosen: exposed_callback_registration (DOM 'input' event also fires natively as a free secondary path)
satisfies_assertions: S2.A2 (callback fires per edit with cumulative value)
depends_on_runtime: A textarea[data-role='latex-input'] in the DOM, provided by section-4 page shell.
verification_notes: onLatexChange registers and notifies on input events; defensive try/catch around each subscriber; safe before/after DOMContentLoaded.
